reviews.portabilityState: agent-neutral body using .agents/skills default with repository-aware output guidance

batchDecision.nextGate: demand-level alternative comparison across native, installed handoff, the two reviewed Skill systems, four non-Skill tooling paths, project standards, and human authority

recheckTriggers: a pinned commit, license file, executable surface, architecture, or upstream security posture changes
alternative comparison selects a source for deeper per-file or dependency review
a body, tool, Hook, adapter, install, execution, or admission action is proposed
new behavior evidence changes overlap, portability, or insufficiency
a child source introduces a materially different capability class
